name: garmin-mcp-charts
description: Build pipeline for garmin_mcp MCP Apps UI charts. Bundles each chart's HTML/JS entry (in this directory) into a single self-contained file under ../charts/, which is what the Python server actually serves.

scripts.build: cross-env INPUT=sleep_chart.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=heart_rate_chart.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=stress_chart.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=steps_chart.html vite build
